title: Plumeet Retro Wall Clock, 12'' Non Ticking Classic Silent Vintage Wall Clocks Decorative Kitchen Living Room Bedroom, Roman Numerals, Battery Operated
features: Wall Clocks for Living Room -- Classical look, 12 inches, no ticking super quiet movement, big roman numerals clear to read. large decorative for home and office, best gift for your family or friends.

Superior Movement Quality -- We have selected a reliable clock mechanism to guarantee accurate time, quiet sweep second hands ensure a good sleeping and work environment, this clock will definitely impress you.

Western Classical Style -- Antique and vintage style decoration, with practical and beautiful combination. clear display and convenient to read time with large number inside, very aesthetically pleasing.
Easy install -- Come with a very easy installation kit included, securely hangs on your wall within a few seconds. Powered by 1*AA battery (not included).

About Plumeet: Plumeet has been committed to developing home clock for many years. Now we have extensive product lines, better quality product and customer service. In case of any issue or complaints about this clock, please don’t hesitate to contact us. It’s always our persistence and belief to provide high-quality products and satisfactory customer services.

Reliable Clock Movement Lets You Have A Good Night's Sleep Suitable For Different Styles Of Place Previous page Next page Clear Glass It is super easy to clean because the clock is cased with a flat lens that covers and protects the face from dust and debris. Super Silent You don't need to worry about the ticking of clocks when you need some peace and quiet to concentrate on your work or enjoy a good sleep. Easy to Install Come with a easy installation kit included, just put a small nail through the plastic hook and it securely hangs on your wall within a few seconds. Applicable Walls It is widely suitable for most walls like concrete/cement wall, stucco/plaster wall, wall paper/wooden wall.
